ham.subject: Important: Updated Leave Policy Effective May 1, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well. We want to keep everyone in the loop regarding an important update to our company leave policy which will be effective from **May 1, 2026**.

**Key changes include:**
- **Annual Leave**: 18 days for all full‑time employees, increased from 15.
- **Sick Leave**: 12 paid days per calendar year, with a maximum of 5 consecutive days without a medical certificate.
- **Personal/Compassionate Leave**: 5 days per year, can be combined with sick leave if needed.
- **Unpaid Leave**: Approved by the manager, no limit but must be taken in blocks of 5 days.
- **Carry‑over**: Up to 5 unused annual leave days can be carried over to the next year. Any excess will be forfeited.
- **Leave Approval Process**: Submit your leave request through the HR portal at least 7 days in advance. Managers will review and respond within 2 business days.

**How to apply:**
1. Log in to the HR portal.
2. Go to the ‘Leave Management’ section.
3. Click ‘Add New Leave’ and fill in the required details.
4. Submit and await approval.

For any questions or clarifications, feel free to reach out to the HR help desk at hr@company.com or call 0123‑456‑789.

Thank you for your attention and cooperation.

Best regards,

Ravi Sharma
HR Manager

spam.subject: Congratulations! You are selected for a full scholarship at XYZ University
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are pleased to inform you that **you have been shortlisted** for a **full scholarship** at XYZ University for the academic year 2026‑2027. Your application score of 96% has placed you among the top 1% of applicants.

**What you need to do next:**
1. Confirm your acceptance by clicking the link below and filling in your personal details.
2. Pay the **verification fee** of ₹5,000 to our designated bank account. This fee covers the administrative costs of processing your scholarship.
3. Submit your bank transfer receipt within 48 hours.

Failure to complete these steps will result in the withdrawal of your scholarship offer.

**Urgent Notice:**
The university will only be able to process the scholarship if the verification is completed within **7 days** from the date of this email. Delay may lead to loss of the full tuition waiver.

Please click the secure link to proceed: <URL>

Best wishes for your future endeavors.

Sincerely,

Dr. Anil Kumar
Director, Admissions Office
XYZ University
